hero.title: We Are IMDb
hero.subtitle: The world's most trusted source for entertainment discovery since 1990

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: To empower every entertainment fan on the planet to discover, explore, and connect with the stories they love. We're building the definitive platform for movie, TV, and streaming content — combining comprehensive data with personalized recommendations to transform how people find their next favorite watch.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where every entertainment choice is informed, personal, and effortless. We envision IMDb as the universal remote for your entertainment life — seamlessly connecting you to the content that matters most, across every screen and every platform.

journey.heading: Our Journey
journey.1990: IMDb founded as a Usenet group by movie enthusiasts
journey.1998: Acquired by Amazon, expanded into a global database
journey.2002: Launched user ratings and reviews system
journey.2017: Launched IMDb Freedive (now IMDb TV) streaming service
journey.2020: Expanded to connected TV platforms and global markets
journey.2024: Launched AI-powered recommendations and personalized feeds

features.heading: Why IMDb
features.comprehensiveDesc: Access the world's largest collection of movie, TV, and streaming content information — from cast and crew details to trivia, box office data, and beyond.
features.personalizedDesc: Get intelligent recommendations powered by machine learning that adapt to your unique taste across every genre, decade, and platform.
features.communityDesc: Join millions of fans rating, reviewing, and discussing their favorite content. Your voice shapes how others discover entertainment.
features.crossPlatformDesc: Seamless experience across web, mobile, tablet, and connected TV — pick up where you left off, on any device.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Get in touch with our team

hero.title: We're Here to Help
hero.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or need assistance? Reach out — we'd love to hear from you.

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your question or issue in detail...
form.successDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I reset my password?
faq.a1: Visit the sign-in page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
faq.q2: How do I update my account information?
faq.a2: Go to your Profile page where you can update your name, email, and other account details.
faq.q3: How do I report incorrect content?
faq.a3: Use the 'Report' button on any content page, or contact our support team directly.
faq.a4: Yes, we offer API access for developers. Visit our Developer Portal for documentation and API keys.

hero.title: Your Privacy Matters
hero.subtitle: Last updated: June 15, 2026
hero.description: We believe in transparency about how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: IMDb LLC ('IMDb', 'we', 'us', or 'our') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services. Please read this policy carefully. By using IMDb, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

collection.title: Information We Collect
items: Account information: name, email address, username, and password
Profile information: avatar, bio, favorite genres, and watchlist
Usage data: pages viewed, ratings, reviews, search queries, and interaction patterns
Device information: IP address, browser type, operating system, and device identifiers
Location data: general location based on IP address for regional content

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
items: To provide, maintain, and improve our services and personalized recommendations
To communicate with you about your account, updates, and promotional offers
To analyze usage patterns and optimize platform performance
To detect, prevent, and address technical issues and abuse
To comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms of service

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with trusted third-party service providers who assist in operating our platform, subject to strict confidentiality agreements. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights and the safety of our users.

security.title: Data Security
security.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, regular security audits, access controls, and employee training on data protection best practices. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: Your Rights & Choices
items: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
Correction: Update or correct inaccurate personal information
Deletion: Request deletion of your account and personal data
Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Opt-out: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and deliver personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings or our Cookie Preference Center. See our Cookie Policy for more details.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.body: Our services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, we will take steps to delete such information promptly.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on this page and, where appropriate, via email or in-app notification. Your continued use of IMDb after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@imdb.com or write to us at: IMDb LLC, 2901 3rd Ave, Suite 300, Seattle, WA 98121, United States.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.description: Terms of service for using IMDb

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Last updated: June 15, 2026
hero.description: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using IMDb ('the Platform'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ('Terms'). If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must not use the Platform. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of such changes.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Platform. If you are under 18, you must have parental or legal guardian consent. By using the Platform, you represent that you meet these requirements and that all information you provide is accurate and complete.

account.title: Account Registration
account.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or engage in fraudulent activity.

content.title: User-Generated Content
content.body: By submitting ratings, reviews, comments, or other content, you grant IMDb a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content on the Platform. You represent that your content does not infringe third-party rights or violate any laws. We reserve the right to remove content that violates our Community Guidelines.

conduct.title: Prohibited Conduct
items: Using the Platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws
Impersonating any person or entity or falsely stating your affiliation
Interfering with the proper functioning of the Platform, including introducing malware
Attempting to access, scrape, or data-mine the Platform without authorization
Harassing, threatening, or abusing other users
Posting spam, advertising, or promotional content without authorization

ip.title: Intellectual Property Rights
ip.body: The Platform and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by IMDb and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Our name, logo, and brand features are trademarks of IMDb. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.body: The Platform may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by IMDb. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites. You acknowledge and agree that IMDb shall not be liable for any loss or damage caused by your use of third-party services.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimers.body: The Platform is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied. IMDb does not warrant that the Platform will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free. We make no guarantees regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any content on the Platform.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, IMDb shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform. Our total liability for any claims under these Terms shall not exceed the amount you have paid us in the past twelve months.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform will immediately cease. Provisions regarding intellectual property, disclaimers, and liability shall survive termination.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Washington, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in King County, Washington.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.body: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@imdb.com or write to: IMDb LLC, 2901 3rd Ave, Suite 300, Seattle, WA 98121, United States.

hero.title: How Can We Help?
hero.subtitle: Search our knowledge base or browse by category

q1.q: How do I create an IMDb account?
q1.a: Click 'Sign In' in the top navigation, then select 'Create your account'. Enter your name, email address, and a secure password. You can also sign up using your Google or Facebook account for faster registration.

q2.q: How do I reset my password?
q2.a: Click 'Sign In', then select 'Forgot password'. Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a password reset link. For security, the link expires after 1 hour.

q3.q: How do I delete my account?
q3.a: Go to your Profile settings and scroll to 'Account Management'. Click 'Delete Account' and follow the confirmation steps. Your data will be permanently removed within 30 days.

q4.q: How does the rating system work?
q4.a: You can rate any movie or TV show on a scale of 1 to 10 stars. Your personal ratings help us generate personalized recommendations. The overall rating displayed is a weighted average of all user ratings.

q5.q: How do I write a review?
q5.a: Navigate to any title's page, scroll to the reviews section, and click 'Write a Review'. Reviews must follow our Community Guidelines and be at least 50 characters long.

q6.q: Can I edit or delete my review?
q6.a: Yes. Go to your Profile page, find the review under 'My Reviews', and use the edit or delete options. You can edit a review within 30 days of posting.

q7.q: How do I find something to watch?
q7.a: Use the search bar at the top, browse by genre or category on the Home page, or check personalized recommendations based on your rating history. Our 'Watch Guide' curates trending content daily.

q8.a: IMDb tracks availability across 200+ streaming services including Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Hulu, HBO Max, Apple TV+, and many regional platforms. Check a title's page to see where it's streaming.

q9.q: How do I add to my watchlist?
q9.a: Click the bookmark icon on any movie or TV show page, or use the 'Add to Watchlist' button. Access your watchlist from the profile menu or your profile page.

q10.q: Why is the site loading slowly?
q10.a: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies. Ensure your browser and operating system are up to date. Check your internet connection speed. If issues persist, try disabling browser extensions temporarily.

q11.q: How do I report a bug?
q11.a: Contact our support team through the Contact Us page with a detailed description of the issue, steps to reproduce it, your browser version, and any error messages. Screenshots are very helpful.

q12.a: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and security practices to protect your data. We never sell your personal information. See our Privacy Policy for complete details on how we handle your data.

cta.heading: Still Need Help?
cta.subheading: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.

Subscription.title: Subscription Plans
Subscription.description: Choose the perfect plan for you

hero.title: Unlock the Full IMDb Experience
hero.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your entertainment needs. All plans include personalized recommendations, ad-free browsing, and exclusive features.

pro.name: IMDb Pro
features: No ads on ratings and reviews

q1.q: Can I switch plans at any time?
q1.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, while downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.

q2.q: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
q2.a: Yes, IMDb Pro includes a 7-day free trial. No credit card is required to start your trial. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends.

q3.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, and Apple Pay. Enterprise plans also support invoicing and purchase orders.

q4.a: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period. No partial refunds are provided.

q5.q: Is my data retained after cancellation?
q5.a: Your ratings, reviews, and profile data are retained for 90 days after cancellation in case you reactivate. After 90 days, non-essential data may be anonymized or deleted.

cta.heading: Start Your Journey Today
cta.subheading: Join 250 million users who trust IMDb for their entertainment discovery.

Careers.title: Careers
Careers.description: Join the team shaping the future of entertainment

hero.title: Shape the Future of Entertainment
hero.subtitle: Join a team of innovators, storytellers, and engineers building the world's most trusted entertainment platform.

culture.heading: Our Culture
culture.body: At IMDb, we believe that great entertainment brings people together. Our culture is built on curiosity, collaboration, and a shared passion for movies, TV, and technology. We're a diverse team of over 2,000 employees across 15 offices worldwide, united by our mission to help fans discover and connect with the content they love.
values: Innovation First — We challenge conventions and embrace bold ideas
User Obsession — Every decision starts with what's best for our users
Diversity & Inclusion — Different perspectives make us stronger
Data Driven — We measure, learn, and iterate relentlessly
Global Mindset — Entertainment has no borders, and neither do we

benefits.heading: Why Work at IMDb
benefits.healthDesc: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance. Mental health support and wellness programs.
benefits.equityDesc: Competitive salaries, annual bonuses, stock options, and 401(k) matching.
benefits.growthDesc: Learning budgets, conference attendance, mentorship programs, and clear promotion paths.
benefits.flexibilityDesc: Remote-first culture with flexible hours. Work from home, our offices, or a mix of both.
benefits.timeoffDesc: Unlimited PTO, paid parental leave, sabbatical programs, and company-wide recharge days.
benefits.perksDesc: Free movie screenings, streaming subscriptions, event tickets, and IMDb Swag store access.

process.heading: Hiring Process
process.step1Desc: Submit your application and our talent team reviews your background and experience.
process.step2Desc: A 30-minute call with a recruiter to discuss your experience, interests, and the role.
process.step3Desc: A practical exercise or technical interview relevant to the position you're applying for.
process.step4Desc: Meet with future teammates and cross-functional partners across 3-4 sessions.
process.step5Desc: Receive your offer, complete onboarding, and start making an impact from day one.

cta.heading: Don't See the Right Role?
cta.subheading: We're always looking for talented people. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind.

Cookies.title: Cookies Policy
Cookies.description: How we use cookies and similar technologies

hero.title: Cookie Preferences
hero.subtitle: Learn how IMDb uses cookies and manage your preferences
hero.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and deliver personalized content.

intro.heading: What Are Cookies?
intro.body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences, understand how you interact with the site, and provide a personalized experience. IMDb uses cookies and similar technologies like web beacons, pixels, and local storage to improve our services.

essential.name: Essential Cookies
essential.desc: Required for the platform to function properly. These enable core features like account authentication, security, and session management. They cannot be disabled.

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.desc: Remember your preferences and choices to provide a personalized experience. These enhance usability but are not essential for basic functionality.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: Help us understand how users interact with our platform. We use this data to improve performance, fix issues, and optimize user experience.

advertising.name: Advertising Cookies
advertising.desc: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and measure their effectiveness. These may track your browsing across websites over time.

manage.heading: Managing Your Cookies
manage.body: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time. Essential cookies are always active as they are necessary for the platform to function. You can enable or disable other categories using the controls below. Alternatively, most browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings.
manage.browserSettingsDesc: Most browsers allow you to view, block, or delete cookies through their privacy settings. Check your browser's help documentation for specific instructions.
manage.optOutDesc: You can opt out of analytics cookies through our preference center. For advertising cookies, visit the Digital Advertising Alliance's opt-out page.
manage.impactDesc: Disabling certain cookies may affect platform functionality. Essential features like sign-in and account management require cookies. You may still use the platform but with reduced personalization.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.body: Some cookies are placed by trusted third-party services. These include analytics providers (like Google Analytics), advertising partners, and social media platforms. We carefully vet all third-party services to ensure they meet our privacy standards. These third parties may use cookies for their own purposes.

updates.heading: Updates to This Policy
updates.body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, regulation, or our practices. We will notify you of material changes through the platform or via email. The 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last revised.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact our Data Protection Team at privacy@imdb.com.

section1.heading: We Value Your Input
section1.body: Your feedback helps us improve IMDb. Let us know what you love, what you'd like to see changed, or any features you'd like us to add. We read every submission and appreciate your input. Our product team uses community feedback to guide development priorities.

section2.heading: Feature Suggestions
section2.body: Have an idea for a new feature? We want to hear it. Describe the feature you'd like to see, how it would work, and why it would be useful. While we can't implement every suggestion, we carefully review all ideas and consider them for future updates.

section3.heading: Report a Problem
section3.body: If you've encountered a bug, incorrect information, or a broken feature, please let us know. Include details about what you were doing, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened. Screenshots and your device information are especially helpful.

section1.heading: Press Room
section1.body: Welcome to the IMDb press room. Here you'll find company announcements, media resources, and press contacts. For press inquiries, please reach out to our communications team. We provide journalists and media professionals with the latest news, statistics, and resources they need to cover IMDb and the entertainment industry.

section2.heading: Media Resources
section2.body: Our media resources include logos, brand guidelines, screenshots, and product fact sheets. These materials are available for editorial coverage and press use. All materials should be used in accordance with our brand guidelines. For access to our media kit, please contact the press team.

section3.heading: Press Contacts
section3.body: For press inquiries, interview requests, or media partnerships, please contact our communications team. We aim to respond to all press inquiries within 24 hours. For urgent matters, please indicate the priority in your subject line.

Guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
Guidelines.description: Our community standards and best practices

hero.title: Community Guidelines
hero.subtitle: Help us keep IMDb a welcoming, informative, and respectful space for entertainment fans worldwide.
hero.description: Our guidelines are designed to foster constructive discussions and protect our community.

beRespectful.title: Be Respectful
beRespectful.desc: Treat others with dignity and respect. Disagreements are fine, but personal attacks, harassment, hate speech, and bullying are not tolerated. We celebrate diverse perspectives and constructive debate.

stayRelevant.title: Stay on Topic
stayRelevant.desc: Keep discussions focused on movies, TV shows, and entertainment. Off-topic content, spam, and self-promotion may be removed. Use the appropriate sections and forums for your contributions.

noSpoilers.title: No Spoilers Without Warning
noSpoilers.desc: Always include spoiler warnings for recent releases. Use the spoiler tag feature when discussing plot details. Respect that others may not have seen the latest episodes or films.

originalContent.title: Share Original Content
originalContent.desc: Post your own thoughts and opinions. Don't plagiarize or post copyrighted material without permission. If sharing external content, provide proper attribution and context.

accurateInfo.title: Keep It Accurate
accurateInfo.desc: Share accurate information. If you're unsure about a fact, indicate it. Deliberately spreading misinformation, fake news, or unsubstantiated rumors is prohibited.

reportIssues.title: Report Violations
reportIssues.desc: See something that violates our guidelines? Use the report feature to flag content for review. Don't engage with trolls or problematic content — report and move on.

bestPractices.heading: Best Practices
bestPractices.constructiveDesc: Focus on the content, not the person. Critique ideas, performances, and storytelling rather than attacking individuals. Thoughtful criticism enriches our community.
bestPractices.citeSourcesDesc: When sharing news, industry data, or factual claims, provide sources when possible. This helps maintain the credibility of discussions and empowers others to learn more.
bestPractices.useFormattingDesc: Use proper grammar, punctuation, and formatting to make your contributions readable. Avoid excessive capitalization, emoji overload, or formatting that disrupts discussion flow.
bestPractices.beInclusiveDesc: Welcome new members and different perspectives. Avoid gatekeeping or elitist attitudes. Our community is stronger when everyone feels they belong.
bestPractices.respectPrivacyDesc: Don't share personal information about yourself or others. Avoid doxxing, stalking, or any behavior that compromises anyone's safety or privacy.

moderation.heading: Moderation & Enforcement
moderation.body: Our moderation team works around the clock to ensure IMDb remains a safe and welcoming space. We use a combination of automated systems and human moderators to review reported content.

actions.heading: Enforcement Actions
actions.warning: Warning: First-time or minor violations result in a warning and explanation of the violated rule.
actions.removal: Content Removal: Violating content is removed with a notification to the contributor.
actions.suspension: Temporary Suspension: Repeated violations lead to temporary account suspension.
actions.permanent: Permanent Ban: Severe or persistent violations result in permanent account termination.

moderation.appeal: You can appeal moderation decisions by contacting our appeals team at appeals@imdb.com. Appeals are reviewed within 5 business days.

cta.heading: Together We Build a Better Community
cta.subheading: Every contribution matters. Thank you for helping make IMDb the best place for entertainment fans.
